title: Harpic Active Fresh Toilet Rim Block, Lime Fresh, Pack of 6, Anti-Limescale, Dirt Remover, Lasts up to 30 weeks and up to 1250 flushes, Toilet Cleaner, Toilet Freshener
description: Product Description Harpic Power 6: A toilet block that freshens your toilet block for up to 250 flushes! Its 6 powerful actions colours your water blue for continuous cleaning and freshness with every flush. Harpics 6 Powers are 1. Shine 2. Dirt removal 3. Anti-limescale 4. Lasts up to 4 weeks 5. Fresh fragrance 6. 50% more active foam vs old Harpic Fresh Power 6. Free from: bleach & phosphates. Ingredients Benzenesulfonic acid, C10-13-alkyl derivs., sodium salts, sodium dodecylbenzenesulfonate, Cellulose, carboxymethyl ether, 4-tert-Butylcyclohexyl acetate, reaction mass of: (E)- oxacyclohexadec-12-en-2-one; (E)-oxacyclohexadec-13-en-2-one; a) (Z)-oxacyclohexadec-(12)-en2-one and b) (Z)-oxacyclohexadec-(13)-en-2-one, 2,6-di-tert-butyl-p-cresol, alpha-Hexylcinnamaldehyde, p-t-Butyl-alphamethylhydrocinnamic aldehyde, 2-Methylundecanal , 1-(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8-Octahydro-2,3,8, 8-tetramethyl-2-naphthalenyl) ethanone, alpha-Cedrene
